ddls:
CREATE TABLE "investment_schemes" (
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment scheme */,
  "scheme_name" TEXT /* Name of the investment scheme (e.g., QDII, QFII) */,
  "target_flows" TEXT /* Type of target flows (e.g., Portfolio inflow, Portfolio outflow) */,
  "start_year" INTEGER /* Year when the scheme started */,
  "quota_limit" TEXT /* Indicates if there is a quota limit (Yes/No) */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the investment scheme */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quota_limits" (
  "limit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quota limit record */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investment scheme associated with this limit */,
  "total_quotas_allotted_billion" REAL /* Total quotas allotted for the scheme in billions */,
  "cap_individual_quota" TEXT /* Cap on individual quota (if applicable) */,
  "cap_total_quotas" TEXT /* Cap on total quotas for the scheme (if applicable) */,
  "quota_limit_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the quota limit is denoted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("limit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quota_limits_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES investment_schemes ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "investment_requirements" (
  "requirement_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each investment requirement */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investment scheme associated with this requirement */,
  "min_investment_required" TEXT /* Minimum investment required for the scheme */,
  "currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the minimum investment is denoted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requirement_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_investment_requirements_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES investment_schemes ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quota_history" (
  "history_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quota history record */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investment scheme associated with this record */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year for which the quota usage is recorded */,
  "quota_used" REAL /* Total quota used in the year */,
  "remaining_quota" REAL /* Remaining quota at the end of the year */,
  "quota_used_currency" TEXT /* Currency in which the quota used is denoted */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("history_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quota_history_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES investment_schemes ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "username" TEXT /* Username chosen by the user */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password for the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., Administrator, Compliance Officer, Financial Analyst) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "user_permissions" (
  "permission_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each permission record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user associated with this permission */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investment scheme associated with this permission */,
  "view_permission" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has view permission */,
  "edit_permission" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has edit permission */,
  "delete_permission" INTEGER /* Indicates if the user has delete permission */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("permission_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES investment_schemes ("scheme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_user_permissions_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "quota_alerts" (
  "alert_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each quota alert record */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investment scheme associated with this alert */,
  "threshold" REAL /* Threshold percentage for the quota limit */,
  "alert_level" TEXT /* Alert level (e.g., Low, Medium, High) */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Timestamp when the record was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("alert_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_quota_alerts_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES investment_schemes ("scheme_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "audit_trail" (
  "audit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each audit record */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the user who performed the action */,
  "scheme_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the investment scheme associated with this action */,
  "action" TEXT /* Type of action performed (e.g., Create, Update, Delete) */,
  "timestamp" TEXT /* Timestamp when the action was performed */,
  "changes" TEXT /* Description of the changes made */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("audit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_scheme_id FOREIGN KEY ("scheme_id") REFERENCES investment_schemes ("scheme_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_audit_trail_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)
